name: Bbq Chicken Quesadillas

ingredients.item: can of kidney or red beans

method: Take a pan and heat beans and chicken with the BBQ sauce.
Add cooked rice, the bean and chicken mixture.
Put more sauce if you like.
To assemble the quesadillas, sprinkle cheddar cheese.
Then add cheese on chicken mixture. Use additional cheese if you
On each quesadilla, place another tortilla, and set aside.
Take a pan and toast quesadillas over the medium heat, then cook
